title: fork new catalog entry provenance
purpose: D5.3 defines fork new catalog entry provenance for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse.
scope: Owns `D5.3` only; siblings under `D5` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §6 — Branch D — Platform evolution plane (parallel queue)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#6-branch-d-platform-evolution-plane-parallel-queue).
behavior_steps: When compose-first cannot extend a catalog entry without breaking consumers or pack isolation, the conductor records the divergence in [B4.4](B4.4-divergence-log-when-not-composing.md) and opens a fork with provenance back to the source promotion or parent artifact.

Platform workers allocate a new catalog id, append an INDEX row, and wire a staleness graph node per [D6.4](D6.4-platform-done-staleness-node-wired.md) before marking the fork item done in the promotion queue.
Downstream task cards migrate explicitly from the old id to the new entry; silent aliasing is forbidden so goal_verify evidence remains tied to one canonical component.
Pack fragments from [D4.6](D4.6-platform-work-pack-fragment-export.md) may fork upward into the template-pack namespace when company boundaries require a separate reusable artifact.
Fork without provenance fails closed at H2 and blocks SEC-14 gap-analysis trust rather than publishing an untraceable catalog entry.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Platform queue depth 0 but product blocked on missing playbook â€” D3.3 priority cut skips platform drain.
Edge case `D5.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `D5.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Scheduler in autopilot workflow: `(steps_total % K) == 0` â†’ platform turn.
playbook-keeper + script extraction skills dequeue promotion items.
Validate `D5.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `D5.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `D5.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: D5.3 defines fork new catalog entry provenance for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse. In practice, the system when compose-first cannot extend a catalog entry without breaking consumers or pack isolation, the conductor records the divergence in [b4.4](b4.4-divergence-log-when-not-composing.md) and opens a fork with provenance back to the source promotion or parent artifact, then platform workers allocate a new catalog id, append an index row, and wire a staleness graph node per [d6.4](d6.4-platform-done-staleness-node-wired.md) before marking the fork item done in the promotion queue.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-d 2026-06-28 -->

Fork creates a new catalog entry with provenance link to the source promotion or parent artifact—used when behavior diverges, pack boundary requires isolation, or extend would break consumers. Fork records why compose-first failed ([B4.4](B4.4-divergence-log-when-not-composing.md)) and what was invented.

New id, new INDEX row, new staleness node ([D6.4](D6.4-platform-done-staleness-node-wired.md)) are mandatory. Fork without provenance blocks SEC-14 gap analysis trust. Downstream task cards migrate explicitly; silent alias is forbidden. Pack fragments ([D4.6](D4.6-platform-work-pack-fragment-export.md)) may fork upward into template-pack namespace.
